ddls:
CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "nick_name" TEXT /* Nickname of the coach */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "city_of_birth_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the coach was born */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nation where the coach was born */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the coach in kg */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the coach in cm */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the coach within the team */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience coaching */,
  "occupation" INTEGER /* Occupation of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "former_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the former player, if applicable */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specific areas of expertise */,
  "management_style" TEXT /* Style of managing players */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any relevant coaching certifications */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach's contract ends or was terminated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team participates in */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Team's Twitter handle for social media presence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is associated with */,
  "contract_salary" REAL /* Annual contract salary of the player */,
  "contract_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the player's contract in years */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the player */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "position_specific" TEXT /* More detailed position information */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Player's batting hand */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Player's throwing hand */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract started */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract ends */,
  "contract_extension_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract extension starts */,
  "contract_extension_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract extension ends */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Overall performance rating */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Current training status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the contract belongs to */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary specified in the contract */,
  "years" INTEGER /* Duration of the contract in years */,
  "extension_salary" REAL /* Salary if the contract is extended */,
  "extension_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the contract extension in years */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract started */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract ends */,
  "extension_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract extension starts */,
  "extension_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract extension ends */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Any performance-based or signing bonuses */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouting_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scouting report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the report is about */,
  "major" INTEGER /* Major scouting grade (1-10) */,
  "minor" INTEGER /* Minor scouting grade (1-10) */,
  "international" INTEGER /* International scouting grade (1-10) */,
  "amateur" INTEGER /* Amateur scouting grade (1-10) */,
  "amateur_preference" INTEGER /* Preference for amateur scouts (1-5) */,
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scout who generated the report */,
  "scout_name" TEXT /* Name of the scout */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "player_potential" INTEGER /* Potential rating for the player (1-10) */,
  "player_weakness" TEXT /* Weaknesses of the player */,
  "player_strengths" TEXT /* Strengths of the player */,
  "player_overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating of the player (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "hitting_focus" INTEGER /* Focus on hitting metrics (1-10) */,
  "pitching_focus" INTEGER /* Focus on pitching metrics (1-10) */,
  "training_focus" INTEGER /* Focus on overall training metrics (1-10) */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  "hitting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "pitching_era" REAL /* Earned run average */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of runs allowed */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_reports" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Recovery time in days */,
  "rehab_status" TEXT /* Current status of rehabilitation */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Name of the doctor treating the injury */,
  "injury_severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the injury (1-10) */,
  "rehab_start_date" TEXT /* Date when rehabilitation started */,
  "rehab_end_date" TEXT /* Date when rehabilitation is expected to end */,
  "rehab_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the rehabilitation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach involved in the interaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  "interaction_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the interaction */,
  "interaction_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_interactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_interactions_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)
